title: QC Validation Consultant
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

KERRY CONSULTING PTE. LTD. Headquarted in Singapore since 2003, Kerry Consulting is an award winning Search & Selection headhunting firm with 6 Best Headhunting Awards in Asiamoney Headhunter Polls for Asia since 2009. Licence no. 16S8060

Job Summary

We are engaging a QC Validation Consultant to support validation and qualification activities within a regulated environment. This role suits someone who is hands-on with C&Q execution, documentation, and data integrity expectations across QC systems and/or analytical instruments.

Responsibilities

  • Execute and document Commissioning & Qualification (C&Q) activities including Installation Qualification (IQ), Operational Qualification (OQ), and Performance Qualification (PQ) to ensure compliance with regulatory standards
  • Prepare, review, and finalize validation deliverables such as protocols, test scripts, traceability matrices, summaries, and reports to support audit readiness
  • Support validation and qualification activities for regulated QC systems and analytical instruments to maintain system integrity and operational excellence
  • Collaborate effectively with internal stakeholders across QC, Engineering, Automation/IT, and QA to align project timelines and deliverables
  • Manage deviation and exception documentation by providing investigation inputs and preparing closure packs to ensure timely resolution
  • Maintain rigorous documentation discipline to uphold data integrity and support compliance with regulatory requirements
  • Contribute to compliance deliverables aligned with data integrity and system validation requirements to facilitate successful audits and inspections

Required competencies and certifications

  • 3-5 years of relevant validation experience in Computer System Validation (CSV), Commissioning & Qualification (C&Q), or equipment/instrument qualification within regulated environments
  • Experience working in pharmaceutical, biotech, or medical device manufacturing and QC laboratories
  • Familiarity with key industry standards and guidelines including ISPE Baseline Guide Vol 5 (C&Q, 2nd Edition), GAMP 5, 21 CFR Part 11, EU Annex 11, and USP 1058
  • Strong technical writing skills with the ability to produce structured, clear, and compliant documentation
  • Proven ability to work effectively under tight timelines and manage shifting priorities in a dynamic project environment

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • None stated
